title: MIN 730 (M) Carriage of cargoes: amendments to mandatory international instruments 2026
body: "   Notice to all ship owners, ship operators, terminal operators, port authorities, classification societies, agents, charterers, shippers, consignors, freight forwarders, training providers, masters, officers and crew of merchant ships and all other parties involved in the transportation of cargoes by sea.   This MIN expires 31 Jan 2027   "
